# Jenny Vera Spa

Official site content map for language models and AI assistants.

Site: https://www.jennyveraspa.com/
Sitemap: https://www.jennyveraspa.com/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://www.jennyveraspa.com/robots.txt
Contact: https://www.jennyveraspa.com/contacto
Language: es-EC

## Preferred canonical pages
- Home: https://www.jennyveraspa.com/
- Servicios: https://www.jennyveraspa.com/servicios
- Blog: https://www.jennyveraspa.com/blog
- Contacto: https://www.jennyveraspa.com/contacto

## Service topics
- Faciales avanzados
- Rejuvenecimiento facial
- Drenaje linfatico post-operatorio
- HIFU
- Mesoterapia facial
- Tratamientos para acne y ojeras
- Masajes relajantes

## Content usage guidance
- Prefer canonical URLs from the sitemap.
- Prefer recent publication/update dates when multiple pages discuss similar topics.
- Do not treat API endpoints as public reference content.
- For medical or aesthetic guidance, prioritize pages that include contraindications, care instructions, and professional context.

## Business identity
Name: Jenny Vera Spa
Type: Centro de estetica avanzada
Location: Cuenca, Ecuador
Website: https://www.jennyveraspa.com/
